name: Krispie Crunch Candy
recipeInstructions:
A. Blend together the peanut butter, oleo, and powdered sugar.
B. Mix the Rice Krispies with (A) mixture. Blend until crumbled, then form into 1-inch balls.
C. Melt the chocolate chips and paraffin in a double boiler.
D. Dip the balls in the melted chocolate mix.
E. Lay on waxed paper to dry.
